scope_constraints: tickets in queue=support only; no PII export; rate-limit 60/min (TOOL-02 least agency)
credential_type: scoped OAuth token, per-tenant audience, 15-min TTL (ID-01)
isolation_boundary: per-tenant; no cross-tenant ticket access; cross-boundary fails closed server-side
notes: Read-mostly path; no write to customer-visible fields

scope_constraints: amount cap + same-currency only; one refund per order (TOOL-04 high-risk gate)
step_up_required: independent-step-up — re-auth / MFA for amount > 50 USD (ID-05, mitigates AGT-02 excessive agency)
isolation_boundary: refund bound to order's tenant; cross-tenant calls denied
notes: High-risk write; gated tool call must log approver + step-up assertion in evidence

scope_constraints: agent drafts only; per-payment cap + new-payee cooling-off enforced downstream (TOOL-04)
credential_type: short-lived workload identity, customer authz context (ID-01)
approval_required: no — agent stages a draft only
step_up_required: independent-step-up — out-of-band: PSD2 SCA in payment UI gates execution; agent drafts only, never executes (real execution gate is external)
isolation_boundary: per-customer (single-tenant, multi-customer); foreign account-id / payee fails closed server-side (ID-03)
notes: Draft-vs-execute: the binding authorization happens out-of-agent; that gate location is the evidence, not a bare yes/no

allowed_actions: mask IBAN/PAN on outbound response (compensating, not authz)
scope_constraints: applied to read-tool egress; does not replace server-side authorization (DATA-02/DATA-03)
isolation_boundary: per-customer scope enforced server-side, not by the guard
notes: enforce in prod / monitor in staging; known discrepancy: a guard block can surface as success in the UI (block-but-UI-shows-success) — tracked, not a pass
